summary: A Go-based monolithic application featuring a test runner, schema validation, and a recently integrated MCP interface, currently undergoing heavy automated test generation.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra tests (0005-0019, 0025) suggests potential flakiness or gaps in baseline coverage
Scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents/ indicate complex CI/test generation pipelines that may be hard to maintain
Clean git status alongside numerous agent test folders implies tests might be isolated from the main branch or poorly integrated
suggestions: Consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the standard internal/ test files to reduce fragmentation
Review baseline test coverage (0008-baseline-extra-tests) to understand why so many supplementary tests are required
Monitor the new MCP integration (handlers.go, mcp_extra_test.go) for stability as it appears to be a recent focus (FEAT-040/042)
